allow: PowerShell(aws sts get-caller-identity; aws configure get region)

PowerShell(aws ec2 describe-key-pairs --key-names laundry-advisor 2>&1; aws ssm get-parameter --name "/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-default-x86_64" --query "Parameter.Value" --output text)

PowerShell($VPC_ID = aws ec2 describe-vpcs --filters "Name=is-default,Values=true" --query "Vpcs[0].VpcId" --output text; Write-Host "VPC: $VPC_ID"; $SG_ID = aws ec2 create-security-group --group-name laundry-advisor-sg --description "LaundryAdvisor web server" --vpc-id $VPC_ID --query "GroupId" --output text; Write-Host "SG: $SG_ID"; aws ec2 authorize-security-group-ingress --group-id $SG_ID --protocol tcp --port 22 --cidr 0.0.0.0/0; aws ec2 authorize-security-group-ingress --group-id $SG_ID --protocol tcp --port 80 --cidr 0.0.0.0/0; Write-Host "Security group rules added")
